title: sphaerocephalus subglaber
intro: Sphaerocephalus subglaber, also known as button grass or button snakeroot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Sphaerocephalus subglaber include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Sphaerocephalus subglaber is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea.
